text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm jus' a spineless hack dat lost last time...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But that's not gonn' keep me down! I'm gonn' get
up aft'r ev'ry fall!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ze next race is in ze bag! Jus' you vatch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Baffling amalgamation of accents aside, she looks
determined to win.
